particulars.description: The leasehold property known as 8 beehive lane, ilford, essex as the same is registered at the land registry with title no EGL487688 and any part or parts of it and including all rights attached or appurtenant to it and all buildings fixtures fittings plant and machinery from time to time situated on it is charged by way of a first legal mortgage.. All estates or interests in any freehold or leasehold property now and in the future vested in or charged to the company are charged by way of a fixed charge.. All fixtures and fittings from time to time attached to any freehold and leasehold property of the company are charged by way of a fixed charge.. All rents receivable from any lease granted out of and freehold and leasehold property of the company are charged by way of a fixed charge.. For more details, please refer to the instrument.. Notification of addition to or amendment of charge.

The leasehold property known as 8 beehive lane, ilford, essex as the same is registered at the land registry with title no EGL487688 (the "property") and any part or parts of it and including all rights attached or appurtenant to it and all buildings fixtures fittings plant and machinery from time to time situated on it is charged by way of a legal mortgage.. All present and future estates, interests, rights and benefits belonging to or enuring the company under the terms of any lease granted in respect of the property and are charged by way of fixed charge.. All the goodwill of any business or undertaking conducted at the property are charged by way of a fixed charge.. For more details, please refer to the instrument.. Notification of addition to or amendment of charge.

Fixed and floating charges over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill bookdebts uncalled capital buildings fixtures fixed plant and machinery. See the mortgage charge document for full details.
